leadText: The Scanner (Japanese: たんちき Detector) is a Key Item introduced in Generation III.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Pokémon Ruby, Sapphire , and Emerald [ edit | edit source ] The Scanner can be given to Captain Stern in Slateport City in exchange for one of the items associated with Clamperl and its Evolutions; DeepSeaScale or DeepSeaTooth . Pokémon Omega Ruby and Alpha Sapphire [ edit | edit source ] The Scanner can be given to Captain Stern in Slateport City in exchange for a Clear Bell OR or Tidal Bell AS , which can be used to encounter Ho-Oh OR or Lugia AS somewhere on Sea Mauville .

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description R S E A device found inside the Abandoned Ship . FR LG A device used to search for life-forms in water. It looks too difficult to use. OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA S V A device found inside Sea Mauville.
